name: Quiche Lorraine
recipeIngredient: 1 cup reduced-fat/sodium Swiss cheese, shredded, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Unroll pizza dough and fit into a 9-inch pie plate coated with cooking spray. Fold under excess dough and prick the bottom and sides of the dough with a fork.
3. Bake at 375°F for 5 minutes. Set aside.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
5. Coat a nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot. Add bacon and sauté for 5 minutes or until lightly browned. Add green onions and sauté for 2 minutes or until tender. Remove from heat and set aside.
6. Sprinkle half of the shredded cheese into the prepared crust. Top with the bacon mixture.
7. Combine milk, mustard, salt, eggs, and egg whites in a bowl. Stir well with a whisk.
8. Pour the mixture over the bacon mixture and sprinkle with the remaining cheese. Shield the edges of the crust with foil, leaving the egg mixture exposed.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Cut into wedges with a serrated knife.
